/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/main.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/main.dir/home/leviwfrey/projects/graphics/src/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/home/leviwfrey/projects/graphics/src/Shader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/home/leviwfrey/projects/graphics/include/glad.c.o CMakeFiles/main.dir/home/leviwfrey/projects/graphics/src/Model.cpp.o -o main  -lglfw /usr/lib/libGLX.so /usr/lib/libOpenGL.so
